name: subtext
label: Subtext
default: We don't dabble. We go deep on the platforms that power modern B2B companies.

default.name: HubSpot CMS Development
default.description: Custom themes, modules, and HubDB-powered sites. Performance-first, fully integrated with HubSpot's CRM.

default.name: WordPress Development
default.description: Headless and traditional WordPress builds. Custom block editors, plugin development, and WooCommerce.

default.name: Webflow Development
default.description: Pixel-perfect Webflow builds with CMS collections, custom interactions, and clean export-ready code.

default.name: React Development
default.description: Component-driven SPAs and hybrid applications. Next.js, TypeScript, and API-first architectures.

default.name: Enterprise Applications
default.description: Scalable custom web applications, portals, and internal tools built for B2B complexity.
